description_long: This is a large, freestanding advertising billboard supported by a single robust cylindrical metal pole anchored into a concrete base. The main display panel is rectangular and features a corrugated metal backing for structural support, with a printed advertisement on the front. The advertisement includes a prominent image of Uncle Sam pointing, accompanied by bold red and blue text and a website URL. Four metal spotlights are mounted on a horizontal bar below the display, aimed upward to illuminate the advertisement at night. The frame of the board is metallic, with visible support struts and a ladder attached to the pole for maintenance access. The entire structure is situated on a patch of grass, suggesting outdoor placement.
description: A large, pole-mounted metal billboard with a printed Uncle Sam advertisement, spotlights, and a sturdy concrete base. The structure features a corrugated metal backing, metallic frame, and maintenance ladder.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the corrugated metal backing, support struts, and the full height of the central pole anchored in concrete.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the billboard's thin profile, the row of spotlights, and the ladder running up the pole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full advertisement with Uncle Sam, the website URL, and the four spotlights beneath the sign.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pole, ladder, and the billboard's slim edge with spotlights visible underneath.
attribute_frame_design: thick metallic frame with visible support struts and a ladder
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster with Uncle Sam graphic and website URL
